top_signals.title: China-linked actors target more than technology as AI competition with U.S. intensifies
top_signals.summary: Cyberattacks from China-based entities are on the rise and not just targeting specific tech, analysts warn, as the U.S. AI race intensifies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Emerging Market Currencies Erase 2026 Gains as Dollar Advances
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market currencies erased gains for this year, with speculation over higher US interest rates sparking a resurgence in the US dollar.

top_signals.title: Crypto hack theft falls 7% in June to $76 million as Humanity Protocol tops list: PeckShield
top_signals.summary: Crypto hacks hit $75.9M across 40 incidents in June, down 7.1% from May, led by the $31M Humanity Protocol exploit, PeckShield said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: XRP holds above $1 after leverage flush as network activity improves
Halifax ends 173-year high street run as Lloyds ditches branding
top_signals.summary: Lloyds Banking Group is set to ditch its Halifax brand in a move that will end the retail bank’s 173-year run on the high street. The FTSE 100 titan – whose subsidiaries also include Bank of Scotland and Scottish Widows – said on Wednesday it would rebrand Halifax under the central moniker of Lloyds. Lloyds [...]

top_signals.title: US racks up about 400 wins over illegal World Cup streaming sites
top_signals.summary: The World Cup’s organizing body, FIFA, helped identify hundreds of  domains taken down in an action organized by the U.S., along with the help of U.S. broadcaster NBC Universal and other entities.
